responsibilities: Design and lead enterprise-wide transformation programs spanning operating model redesign, process optimization, and culture change
Develop future-state operating models defining roles, governance structures, and decision rights to support transformation goals
Build business cases quantifying cost savings, revenue growth, and efficiency gains from proposed transformation initiatives
Lead change management activities including stakeholder engagement, communication planning, and training to drive adoption
Facilitate executive alignment workshops to define transformation vision, priorities, and success metrics across business units
Identify and prioritize process reengineering opportunities to eliminate redundancies and improve organizational efficiency
Track transformation program performance against KPIs, adjusting implementation plans based on progress and emerging risks
Coach client leadership teams on sustaining transformation momentum and embedding new ways of working post-implementation
